programme.title: Pak! Pak! My Dr. Kwak
programme.desc: An angel is sent to Earth to convince a conman healer to change his way, only to have the conman take advantage of his angelic healing powers. The conman's road to salvation lies in reconciling with one his victims, and the angel has to find a way to get them together.
